series_metadata.series_description: Records contained within the Equipment Inventory Database or on other media that tracks IT equipment, services and inventory relating to the assignment, use, service, maintenance and repairs. IT equipment and services include computers, voicemail, telephones, cell phones, copiers, faxes, scanners and any additional equipment or service managed by IT.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for one (1) state fiscal year after the year generated. Destroy when deemed to have no administrative value. ; Electronic: Retain for one (1) state fiscal year after the year generated. Destroy when deemed to have no administrative value., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
